summary: Created from a 2026-07-18 captioning investigation. Wire comfy_workflows/raw/image_descriptor.json (already authored: Input_Image -> Scale 1MP -> Generate Text (qwen3vl_4b_fp8_scaled, temp 0.2) -> Output_prompt) into a DEV radial action that captions the current image into the prompt box. Goal = judge whether caption->upscale beats re-using the user's thin original prompt. Text-output capture ALREADY EXISTS as a general contract (MPI-242: commandExecutor.js:1347 title-scoped Output_prompt scan + comfyOutputUrls.js:51 readComfyOutputText + delivered via onComplete promptText at :1612). Model needs NO download - same Qwen3-VL 4B text encoder Krea2 already loads. BLOCKER verified in source: generationService.js:769 treats zero media URLs as a CANCELLED generation (emits tool:cancelled + generation:cancelled, ends activity, returns) and discards promptText read one line earlier at :767 - this is the first text-only op in the fleet. Needs an op-level 'returns text not media' declaration; a guard clause at the crash site would be a symptom patch. Rejected after evaluation: JoyCaption/llama.cpp (per-platform native binaries; full record in Cubric-Prompt MPI-12), Florence-2 (user production experience), MXFP8/NVFP4/GGUF/abliterated variants.

Dev harness SHIPPED (6eb1a7a7) + converter bug fixed (cf6a947b). runImageDescribe() in commandExecutor.js runs the engine directly, bypassing generationService zero-media=cancelled; Describe Image radial item behind APP_CONFIG.dev_mode reads the prompt box first image chip via getMediaItems() and writes back via injectPrompts(). Engine-verified 15.1s dense caption off Output_prompt. SEPARATE BUG FOUND+FIXED: workflow-to-api.mjs applied the seed control_after_generate skip inside a COMFY_DYNAMICCOMBO_V3, where the frontend adds no control widget - ate a slot and shifted TextGenerate values left by one (presence_penalty=false, thinking=true stealing use_default_template, use_default_template dropped), silently and as valid JSON; scoped to top level, regression-checked byte-identical on app_head_swap/image_upscale/img_auto_mask. NEW BLOCKER user-reproduced: Qwen3-VL 4B refuses on some images; the briefs NSFW-accurate finding rested on one image and is falsified. use_default_template=false does not change it = weights-deep. Downloading Huihui-Qwen3-VL-4B-Instruct-abliterated fp8_scaled (5.24GB, drop-in clip_name swap). The card creation events rejection of abliterated variants assumed stock handled NSFW and is now VOID. Text-only completion contract still OPEN.

image_descriptor CLOSED. Dev harness + Describe-Image radial shipped (6eb1a7a7); abliterated Qwen3-VL encoder (MPI-311, 1.2.0) solved the refusal blocker; engine-verified dense caption off Output_prompt. Text-only completion contract folded into shipped state at board cleanup (user call).
